bargaining_unit_name: United Steelworkers AFL-CIO CLC on behalf of Salaried Employees of North America Local 9158
longevity_detail: Full base CBA. City-wide administrative/clerical unit; merged units include SENA 9158E (Public Facilities/DND) and 9158F (BCYF). Has no-strike and binding arbitration clauses.
